enrichment.summary: Kyle records a brief morning vlog before an 8am shift, recapping the previous day: driving to Lafayette, doing housework, working on his website until 11pm, and eating poorly. He then talks about stocking up on oatmeal and expanding his diet with pancake mix and chia berry smoothies.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: buys in bulk to avoid running out of core foods like oatmeal
actively trying to diversify beyond his usual staples, adding pancakes and chia berry smoothies
wants to make them but finds the prep too time-consuming
positive — blends them with banana as a fruit drink and finds it good

transcript.text: Hello, so this is Living in Vlog for 6-3-2013. I looked at my, 14, I looked at my YouTube and
I guess it says the last one that was uploaded was the first, so I guess I didn't upload one
Yesterday. I could have sworn that I did, but anyways, it's like 6-29. I have to work at 8,
But I have to go to the next town over. Well, it's actually in this town, but it's not that far,
But I'm letting my oatmeal do its final cookage, and then I eat it. So yesterday, I rode over
To the next town over, Lafayette. Actually, it was officially Boulder, though, and did some
House, and then we did another one, and then I moved my friend's law, and then I came home
And paid rent to my mom, and then I went back here, and I was working. Just on my website
A little bit. Didn't get that much done, though, but I was working until, like, 11. I, like,
Looked at the computer, and all of a sudden, it said 11. I was like, oh, shit, I should get
To sleep. I had a pizza. I had, like, a couple of Power Bars for lunch, and then I had a pizza,
A Red Baron pizza for dinner, and that's all I had when I came home, so I'm a little bit
Hungry now, so I think I'll have my oatmeal, and then I'll make one of my... I recently...
I'm expanding my diet. Oh, and I got a lot of more bulk foods. I went in, and I got
14, 13 big oatmeal containers, because I don't like running out of my main staples,
You know, and, like, now I have one can of fruit, so I have to go in there, and every
Time I get the fruit, I clean them out. Every time I get any of those, I clean them
Out, but I need to clean them out on the fruit again, and... but I am expanding my staples.
I went in there the other day, and I got a pancake mix, which I haven't made a pancake
Yet, but... because it's just time-consuming, and then, you know, of course, and then the
Syrup for it, and then... I got something else.
But I was taking...
I got this stuff, Guyana berry. No, no, no, a kai berry juice. They sell it at my supermarket,
And I sell it on the side of the instructions for a kai berry juice blend, and it's... you
Put a kai berry... like, a cup of a kai berry juice in a whole banana, and then I have a
Cup of fruit, and I have the cheap fruit there, and that's my fruit drink, and so I'm starting
To have that, you know. You know, it feels good. Oh, and... because they were selling fruit
Really cheaply last week. Anyways, I think I've rambled enough. I mean, I go on and do two
Houses today, and then I come home, and, um... I work my balls off another day, but I'm
Getting closer to this one page. Okay, peace out. The Lord died cross for the flock.
